'''Wlesc''' was a neighborhood in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Pesktda]] on [[Garqi/Legends|Garqi]], located just east of the [[Pesktda Xenobotanical Garden]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] used it as a [[Thrall]] training area. [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]] used [[holovision goggles]] to gain intel on the training area during the [[Battle of Garqi]].<ref name="Dark Tide II" />

==Behind the scenes==
Wlesc first appeared in the [[2000]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Tide II: Ruin]]'', written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]].<ref name="Dark Tide II" />
